affected_pattern: Customers on commitment-discount plans are billed undiscounted after reaching commitment tier
root_cause: Tiered commitment discount not stepped — the discount-stepping function rounded tier thresholds incorrectly so customers who exactly hit the tier were placed in the next-lower discount bucket, resulting in overcharges.
supporting_evidence: SLA Breach RCA Playbook: Tier Threshold Rounding pattern
Pricing function uses floor() where ceil() was intended
Affected accounts sit exactly at tier boundary usage
recommended_action: Patch the discount-stepping function to use ceil() at boundaries
Rerate affected customers and refund the differential
Add property-based test over the entire tier boundary set
Publish internal advisory on tier-boundary rounding to Pricing and Finance
